skill.name: qwen-image-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs. Triggers: qwen image pro, qwen-image-pro, qwen 2 pro, alibaba image pro, dashscope pro, professional text rendering
skill.summary: Professional image generation with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Excellent text rendering and complex design capabilities.
skill.author: tul-sh

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The skill uses the legitimate inference.sh CLI tool to access Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro API for image generation. External command detections are documentation examples, network URLs are legitimate service endpoints, and cryptographic algorithm warnings are scanner misinterpretations. No actual security vulnerabilities present.

high_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Warning (False Positive)
high_findings.description: Static scanner incorrectly flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at multiple lines. Upon review, these are documentation content (parameter names like 'prompt_extend', URLs, and text descriptions). No cryptographic operations are performed.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Scanner misinterpreted text content. Line 3 contains skill metadata, line 9 is a URL, line 29 is 'Complex Designs' description - none involve cryptography.

medium_findings.title: External Command Examples (False Positive)
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 40 locations of 'Ruby/shell backtick execution'. These are documentation examples showing how to use the infsh CLI tool (e.g., 'infsh login', 'infsh app run'). This is legitimate documentation, not actual code execution.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All backticks in SKILL.md are part of markdown code blocks documenting CLI usage. No actual shell execution happens in the skill file itself.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs (False Positive)
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 7 hardcoded URLs. These are legitimate links to inference.sh documentation and example URLs for the image generation service.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs point to inference.sh official documentation and cloud services. No suspicious external endpoints or data exfiltration.

content.value_statement: Create stunning images with professional text rendering and complex designs using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model via inference.sh CLI. Ideal for posters, banners, and marketing materials requiring precise text placement.
actual_capabilities: Generate images with professional text rendering using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model
Create text-heavy posters, banners, and marketing materials with precise text placement
Produce fine-grained realistic images with enhanced semantic adherence
Generate multiple image variations (1-6 images) in a single request
Perform style transfer and image editing with reference images
Support reproducible generation with seed parameters
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and API authentication
Output resolution constrained to 512x512 to 2048x2048 pixels
Image generation credits apply based on inference.sh usage

use_cases.title: Marketing Teams Create Promotional Materials
use_cases.description: Design professional marketing banners and posters with precise text rendering for campaigns, sales, and events.

use_cases.title: Developers Build Image Generation Workflows
use_cases.description: Integrate Qwen-Image Pro into automation pipelines for generating assets, thumbnails, and visual content.

use_cases.title: Content Creators Produce Visual Assets
use_cases.description: Generate social media posts, thumbnails, and branded imagery with customizable text and styles.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

prompt_templates.title: Simple Text-to-Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with the following prompt: [YOUR PROMPT DESCRIPTION]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic image generation for general content

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a professional poster with title "[TITLE TEXT]" in [COLOR] [STYLE] font at the [POSITION]. Below, add subtitle "[SUBTITLE]" in [STYLE]. Background: [DESCRIPTION]. Style: [MODERN/CLEAN/CLASSIC].
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating promotional posters with specific text requirements

prompt_templates.title: Marketing Banner
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [WIDTH]x[HEIGHT] marketing banner for [PRODUCT/CAMPAIGN]. Large text "[MAIN TEXT]" in [COLOR] on [BACKGROUND DESCRIPTION]. Add "[SECONDARY TEXT]" below. Style: professional, modern, clean. Use negative_prompt: "blurry text, distorted text, low quality".
prompt_templates.scenario: Professional marketing materials with precise specifications

prompt_templates.title: Image Variation Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate [NUM] variations of a [DESCRIPTION] with different compositions, color schemes, or styles. Use seed: [NUMBER] for reproducibility.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating multiple design options for selection

output_examples.input: Generate a poster with title 'Summer Sale' in bold red font, subtitle '50% Off Everything' in yellow, on a gradient sunset background
output_examples.output: A generated poster image with professional text rendering showing 'Summer Sale' in bold red at top and '50% Off Everything' in yellow below, set against an orange-to-pink gradient sunset background

output_examples.input: Create a minimalist coffee shop logo with text 'Bean & Brew' in elegant serif font
output_examples.output: A minimalist logo design featuring 'Bean & Brew' text in elegant serif typography, suitable for a coffee shop brand identity

output_examples.input: Generate 4 variations of a futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars
output_examples.output: Four different AI-generated images showing futuristic cityscapes at sunset with flying vehicles, each with unique composition and style variations

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text you want rendered: "Title Text"
Disable prompt_extend (set to false) when you need precise control over the output
Specify font details including color, style, size, and position for text elements
Use negative prompts to avoid common issues like blurry text or low quality
anti_patterns: Do not rely on prompt_extend being disabled by default - explicitly set it to false for precise text control
Avoid prompts exceeding 800 characters as they will be truncated
Do not ignore resolution constraints - total pixels must stay within 512x512 to 2048x2048 range

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI?
Do I need an API key?
faq.answer: Yes, run 'infsh login' to authenticate with your inference.sh account

faq.question: What makes Qwen-Image Pro different from standard models?
faq.answer: Pro model offers professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, and stronger semantic adherence for complex designs

faq.question: How many images can I generate at once?
faq.answer: You can generate 1-6 images in a single request using the num_images parameter

faq.question: Can I edit existing images?
faq.answer: Yes, use reference_images parameter with 1-3 input images for style transfer or editing tasks

faq.question: How do I get reproducible results?
faq.answer: Set the seed parameter to a specific number (0-2147483647) to reproduce the same output
